mapper.select: select count(1) from b_article where deleted = 0
select count(1) from b_comment where deleted = 0
select count(1) from b_user where del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(view_count), 0) from b_article where deleted = 0

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(1) as count from b_article where deleted = 0 and create_time >= #{start} and create_time <= #{end} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(1) as count from b_comment where deleted = 0 and create_time >= #{start} and create_time <= #{end} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(1) as count from b_user where del_flag = '0' and create_time >= #{start} and create_time <= #{end} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date
select status, count(1) as cnt from b_article where deleted = 0 group by status
select status, count(1) as cnt from b_comment where deleted = 0 group by status
select count(1) from b_friend_link where status = 0
select count(1) from b_treehole where deleted = 0
select count(1) from b_comment where deleted = 0 and source = 'treehole'
select status, count(1) as cnt from b_treehole where deleted = 0 group by status

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(1) as count from b_treehole where deleted = 0 and create_time >= #{start} and create_time <= #{end} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date
